design_philosophy: Dark, luxurious, cinematic, and futuristic. Think: Apple × Linear × Tesla × Stripe × Awwwards. Billion-dollar luxury technology company. Minimal but highly interactive. Sophisticated, not flashy.
global_rules: No generic SaaS look. Needs a cinematic, high-end agency feel.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Implement prefers-reduced-motion checks for all animations.
Performance is strictly prioritized: FCP under 2s, 60fps animations.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Use Tetris Bento Grid mode for Stats and Services. Prioritize asymmetry. Use gap-6 to gap-12 depending on viewport.

buttons.primary: Magnetic interaction, solid or rich gradient border, bg-white text-black or bg-primary text-white. Hover state should trigger a subtle Royal Purple or Electric Cyan glow. padding: px-8 py-4. rounded-full.
buttons.secondary: Glassmorphism, transparent background, 1px solid border-white/10, hover:bg-white/5. Magnetic.

cards.style: Crystal Glassmorphism or Tracing Beam variants. bg-[#121212]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5. Hover lifts up slightly with a very subtle cyan/purple ambient drop-shadow.

motion_and_3d.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling is mandatory for the premium feel.
motion_and_3d.reveal: GSAP or Framer Motion split-text reveals for headings. Staggered fade-up for bento grid cards.
motion_and_3d.cursor: Custom glowing cursor or magnetic dot that blends with background using mix-blend-mode.

adaptive_performance_strategy.desktop: Full R3F scene. High-poly L+D monogram, floating glass shards, particles, volumetric lighting, post-processing bloom enabled. dpr=[1, 2].
adaptive_performance_strategy.mid_range: Reduce particle count. Disable heavy volumetric lighting. Keep basic bloom and metallic textures.
adaptive_performance_strategy.mobile: Disable post-processing bloom. Simplify L+D geometry (or use standard standard material without complex environment reflections). Minimal particles. Limit dpr to 1 to ensure 60fps.

sections.description: Premium loading screen. Deep black background with a minimalist glowing counter or L+D trace. Ascends out of view upon reaching 100%.
sections.layout: fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center bg-[#060606]

sections.description: 3D Hero Centerpiece. L+D Monogram rotating. Copy aligned gracefully with generous negative space.
sections.layout: min-h-screen relative flex items-center. Canvas absolute inset-0 z-0. Content relative z-10.

content.headline: Luexe Digital
content.subheadline: Building Digital Experiences That Drive Growth.
content.description: Performance Marketing • Website Development • Lead Generation • Branding • SEO • Conversion Optimization

sections.3d_details: Use @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei. Floating geometric L+D monogram logo (metallic graphite with glowing purple/cyan edges). Particles in background. Mouse-reactive rotation.

sections.description: Animated Stats section. Highlighting elite metrics.
sections.layout: Bento grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4), tight gaps, stark typography.

sections.description: Services bento grid (Performance Marketing, Website Development, Branding & Creative, Lead Generation).
sections.layout: Grid with varied spans. Use Tracing Beam or subtle glass styling. Icons should be @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone).

sections.description: Process timeline (Discover → Strategize → Design → Build → Launch → Scale).
sections.layout: Vertical glowing line connecting steps or a horizontal scroll section.
Minimalist list or looping marquee with low-contrast typography to act as visual texture.

sections.description: Portfolio / Case Studies. Image-heavy, utilizing parallax effects.
sections.layout: Large asynchronous cards. Use provided images.
High-contrast text block with deep storytelling.
Clean cards, quote icons, muted star ratings.
Massive typography (text-[10vw]). High-contrast CTA section merging into the footer.

image_urls.description: Kuwait City skyline night - use for local GCC context or case study background
Dark modern dashboard UI - use for Web Development or Performance Marketing service visualization
Luxury dark office interior - use for 'Why Choose Us' or 'About' section backgrounds

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei three framer-motion gsap @studio-freight/react-lenis @phosphor-icons/react
Load 'General Sans' via fontshare link in index.html or define locally. Use 'Inter' for body.

Implement the 3D scene using primitive geometries (like Box/Extrude) or Text3D to form the 'L' and 'D' if a custom GLTF isn't provided. Apply a MeshStandardMaterial with high metalness and low roughness for the graphite look, and use Emissive materials for the purple/cyan glowing edges.
Strictly follow the performance strategy: Use <Suspense> for 3D elements, detect mobile devices to downgrade dpr and disable expensive shaders/bloom via conditional rendering.
For the bento grids, do not use Shadcn 'Card' if it restricts layout—build custom HTML/Tailwind divs for maximum control.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, navigation links, and major section containers.
Never use pure black/white for text without slight muting, and stick to the defined color palette.
